stemHtml: Consider a parcel of air which is moved upwards in the surrounding air by an external force. Which one of the following situations describes instability?

options.a: The parcel tends to maintain its new altitude after being released.
options.b: The parcel tends to descend when it is released. It will move to, and maintain an altitude below its original altitude.
options.c: The parcel tends to return to its original altitude when it is released.
options.d: The parcel tends to gain altitude after being released.
